preconditions.name: es5-clean-fire-os-only
preconditions.description: ES5 compliance check applies ONLY to Fire OS ambient surfaces (TheSpine, TheSoul). Education surfaces on Surface Pro 5 and S10 FE are modern-JS-tier — ES5 check is not run for them.

preconditions.name: failure-handler-coverage
preconditions.description: Every google.script.run.<fn>Safe() call has a matching .withFailureHandler() that is non-empty (not function(){}).

preconditions.name: theme-palette-declared
preconditions.description: Sparkle Kingdom (JJ) or Wolfdome (Buggsy) palette hex values in surface CSS match the canonical registry at ops/themes/palettes.md.
preconditions.measurement_method: Extract --bg-primary and key brand hex from surface CSS; assert match against palettes.md entry for the surface's theme

preconditions.name: safe-wrapper-chain-intact
preconditions.description: Every server-call chain uses a Safe wrapper function. No direct non-Safe delegation to module functions.
preconditions.measurement_method: grep -n 'google.script.run\.' <surface.html> | assert all callee names end in 'Safe'

universalMustPass.name: correct-device
universalMustPass.description: Test at the mapped viewport for the real device profile. If the device profile is ambiguous or missing from ops/surface-map.md, the run fails as config_drift.
universalMustPass.threshold: Viewport matches device profile in ops/surface-map.md; config_drift if missing
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Assert Playwright viewport equals device profile viewport. Cross-check ops/surface-map.md Device column for the route being tested.

universalMustPass.name: loads-cleanly
universalMustPass.description: Route returns 200, no blank screen, no blocking console error, no endless spinner.
universalMustPass.threshold: HTTP 200; no visible text 'undefined' or 'null'; console error count = 0 (blocking level); spinner resolves within 10s
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Playwright: assert response.status() === 200; assert no blocking console errors; screenshot shows non-blank content within 10s

universalMustPass.name: correct-child-context
universalMustPass.description: The route clearly shows the right child theme, data, and copy — not another child's view or a blank template.
universalMustPass.threshold: Child name or avatar visible; theme matches child (Sparkle Kingdom for JJ, Wolfdome for Buggsy); no wrong-child data visible
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Screenshot inspection; assert child-specific CSS class (e.g. sparkle-body or wolfdome-body) present in DOM

universalMustPass.name: core-loop-starts-fast
universalMustPass.description: The child can begin the intended action within 2 interactions and about 5 seconds of orientation.
universalMustPass.threshold: ≤2 taps/clicks to reach the first interactive state AND child can begin action within ~5s of route ready
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Manual walkthrough: count interactions from route-ready to first intentional child action. Playwright trace for automated timing (requires instrumentation #360).
universalMustPass.source: ADHD accommodation standards; child UX research — attention span 5-7s for task onset

universalMustPass.name: core-loop-completes
universalMustPass.description: One real task, mission, lesson, or draft can be completed end-to-end.
universalMustPass.threshold: At least one full task cycle completes without error, freeze, or corruption
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Manual walkthrough: complete one full task cycle (answer a question, finish a mission, save a comic panel, etc.). Playwright click sequence for automation.
universalMustPass.source: MVSS v1 play gate flow step 5

universalMustPass.name: save-reload-holds
universalMustPass.description: Progress, draft, submission, or completion state survives reload or resume when the surface promises it.
universalMustPass.threshold: After completing an action, reload the route — the completed state is visible. Applies only to surfaces with persistence_contract = 'submitted' or 'draft' in ops/surface-map.md.
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Complete action, reload URL, assert state is preserved. Ephemeral surfaces (persistence_contract = 'ephemeral') are exempt from this criterion.

universalMustPass.name: no-silent-failure
universalMustPass.description: Missing data, audio, or backend responses show an explicit fallback state instead of doing nothing.
universalMustPass.threshold: Introduce a simulated failure (bad data, slow response). Assert a visible fallback element is shown — not a blank, not an un-handled console error.
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Playwright: intercept the API call and return error response; assert a fallback element is rendered in the surface HTML. grep for withFailureHandler(function(){}) as a pre-check (PRE-2).

universalMustPass.name: feedback-understandable
universalMustPass.description: Taps, clicks, answers, and saves produce visible or audible confirmation appropriate for the child's age.
universalMustPass.threshold: Interactive element produces feedback within 500ms. Feedback is visible (color change, animation, message) or audible (sound effect). Silent completion is a failure.
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Tap each interactive element type; assert visible state change within 500ms. Screenshot before-and-after.
universalMustPass.source: Child UX standards; WCAG 2.1 SC 4.1.3 Status Messages

universalMustPass.name: controls-fit-device
universalMustPass.description: Buttons, cards, input fields, and drawing areas are reachable and usable on the target device.
universalMustPass.threshold: Touch targets ≥44px on standard surfaces; ≥60px on JJ tablet (per prek-milestones.md:93). No controls are clipped or outside viewport.
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Playwright: measure all interactive element bounding boxes at device viewport. Assert min-size thresholds per child profile.
universalMustPass.source: WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.8 Target Size Minimum; prek-milestones.md:93

universalMustPass.name: no-dead-ends
universalMustPass.description: The child can recover from an error, back out, continue, or finish without needing adult intervention.
universalMustPass.threshold: From any non-entry state, the child can reach a known good state (back to hub, retry, or finish) without adult help.
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Navigate to an error state or mid-task state; assert a recovery path (back button, retry CTA, or close action) is visible and functional.

universalMustPass.name: truthful-promise
universalMustPass.description: The UI does not claim a reward, save, unlock, or completion that the backend does not honor.
universalMustPass.threshold: Complete an action that should trigger a backend write (save, submit, earn reward). Assert the backend record was created via API call verification.
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Perform save/submit action; verify backend state via getTodayContentSafe or KH mutation confirmation. Assert UI success message matches backend truth.

universalMustPass.name: written-judgment
universalMustPass.description: The run produces a named decision: ship, ship-with-backlog, or do-not-ship with evidence.
universalMustPass.threshold: Run output file contains exactly one of: 'ship', 'ship-with-backlog', 'do-not-ship', 'config_drift', 'preconditions_not_met'. Evidence artifacts (screenshots, findings list) are committed.
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Assert run output JSON has field 'ship_decision' with allowed value. Assert evidence directory has ≥1 screenshot.
universalMustPass.source: MVSS v1 decision rules; ops/work-doctrine.md rule 9

universalMustPass.name: empty-state-defined
universalMustPass.description: The surface declares and renders a specific empty state with a CTA. A blank screen or bare error text does not qualify.
universalMustPass.threshold: When the primary data source returns empty (no questions, no tasks, no content), the surface shows a designed empty-state element with a clear CTA (e.g. 'No homework today — all done!' or 'Come back tomorrow').
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Inject empty data response via Playwright intercept. Assert empty-state element is present in DOM with visible CTA text.
universalMustPass.source: MVSS v1 plan section C — unhappy-path promotion

universalMustPass.name: error-has-retry-path
universalMustPass.description: Errors surface through a designed element with a retry or recovery path. Native alert() banned as primary error UX. Empty withFailureHandler is banned. Gate-check bypass that lets the user through on failure is banned.
universalMustPass.threshold: All error paths use in-surface UI elements (toast, banner, or inline message). No native alert() or confirm() for primary errors. No empty withFailureHandler(function(){}). No gate-check 'pass-through' on failure.
universalMustPass.measurement_method: grep -n 'alert(' <surface.html>; grep -n 'withFailureHandler(function(){}' <surface.html>; simulate gate failure and assert block is shown. Blockers filed as #355, #357.
universalMustPass.source: MVSS v1 plan section C; blocker issues #355 (JJHome), #356 (ComicStudio), #357 (DesignDashboard)

universalMustPass.name: loading-has-max-time
universalMustPass.description: Loading state has a declared maximum wait before a fallback message appears. No endless spinner.
universalMustPass.threshold: Loading spinner or state resolves within 10s; if it does not, a fallback message is shown (e.g. 'Taking too long — try again'). No loading state is uncapped.
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Playwright: intercept API to delay 12s. Assert fallback message appears before 12s. If spinner persists indefinitely, criterion fails.
universalMustPass.source: MVSS v1 plan section C — unhappy-path promotion

universalMustPass.name: offline-behavior-declared
universalMustPass.description: The surface declares its offline behavior: queue, read-only, or refuse-clearly. Silent broken state is not allowed.
universalMustPass.threshold: Surface has documented offline behavior (in source comment or ops spec) AND the behavior is verifiable: either renders read-only content, shows a clear offline message, or queues the action with visible status.
universalMustPass.measurement_method: Playwright: block all network requests. Assert surface shows a recognizable offline state (not blank, not broken JS errors).
universalMustPass.source: MVSS v1 plan section C — unhappy-path promotion

jjMustPass.name: theme-integrity
jjMustPass.description: The route visually matches Sparkle Kingdom promise — not a generic worksheet inside a bright frame.
jjMustPass.threshold: Sparkle Kingdom background, palette, and character/mascot elements are present. Background is deep purple (per ops/themes/palettes.md Sparkle Kingdom set). No plain white or generic card layout.
jjMustPass.measurement_method: Screenshot at jj-learning-tablet viewport; assert sparkle-body CSS class or equivalent background is applied. Assert theme palette hex values match palettes.md.

jjMustPass.name: audio-consistency
jjMustPass.description: Instruction and celebration audio remain consistent within the session. No confusing voice switching if better audio is available.
jjMustPass.threshold: Audio does not switch voices mid-session. Celebration sound plays on correct action. No audio loop or overlap on fast interactions.
jjMustPass.measurement_method: Manual walkthrough with audio enabled. Log audio play events via browser devtools. Assert no voice-switching events within a single session.
jjMustPass.source: PRE-4 voice ID check; phrases.json Nia voice ID

jjMustPass.name: delighted-success
jjMustPass.description: Correct actions produce friendly delight — sparkle, star, celebration, or clear positive feedback.
jjMustPass.threshold: Correct answer or completed action triggers a celebration animation or audio event visible within 500ms.
jjMustPass.measurement_method: Submit correct answer; screenshot at T+500ms; assert celebration element is visible (star count increase, sparkle animation, celebration banner).
jjMustPass.source: ABCmouse joy standard; Khan Academy Kids feedback patterns

jjMustPass.name: gentle-failure
jjMustPass.description: Wrong answers redirect gently — no punishing copy, harsh red-state, or ambiguous 'nothing happened' outcome.
jjMustPass.threshold: Incorrect answer shows a gentle redirect (try again prompt or soft animation). No harsh red flash, no negative copy ('Wrong!', 'No.'). No silent state where nothing visible happens.
jjMustPass.measurement_method: Submit incorrect answer; screenshot at T+500ms; assert gentle redirect element is visible and copy is age-appropriate.
jjMustPass.source: Early childhood learning standards; ABCmouse gentle-failure patterns

jjMustPass.name: age-fit-content
jjMustPass.description: Content, text density, and number of choices fit early-learning attention span and reading level.
jjMustPass.threshold: Question text is ≤15 words for JJ surfaces. Answer choices ≤4 options. No instruction wall (>3 sentences in a single screen).
jjMustPass.measurement_method: Count words in question text and instruction strings. Count answer option elements. Assert thresholds.
jjMustPass.source: prek-milestones.md reading level criteria; Khan Academy Kids content standards

jjMustPass.name: adult-confidence-signal
jjMustPass.description: Parent or teacher can infer progress from saved state, star count, or logged completion even if the child is playing independently.
jjMustPass.threshold: After session completion, ProgressReport or KH parent view shows a record of the activity. Star count or lesson run is visible in parent-facing data.
jjMustPass.measurement_method: Complete a session; check ProgressReport or KidsHub parent view; assert activity record is visible.
jjMustPass.source: ABCmouse parent section; Khan parent reports; MVSS v1 plan section E

buggsyMustPass.name: mission-clarity
buggsyMustPass.description: The goal is clear without a wall of text.
buggsyMustPass.threshold: Mission or task goal is stated in ≤2 sentences or displayed as a visual objective. Child can state the goal without reading a paragraph.
buggsyMustPass.measurement_method: Count words in primary mission/task instruction. Assert ≤30 words for the initial goal statement.
buggsyMustPass.source: Prodigy quest clarity standard; MVSS v1 plan section 5

buggsyMustPass.name: progress-reward-clarity
buggsyMustPass.description: XP, rings, completion, progress, or unlock state is visible and believable.
buggsyMustPass.threshold: Reward/progress indicator is visible in the UI during or after task completion. Completion changes the indicator visibly. No 'earned X rings' with no visible ring count.
buggsyMustPass.measurement_method: Complete a task; assert progress indicator changes state. Screenshot before and after.
buggsyMustPass.source: Prodigy reward momentum; KH reward system (rings, XP)

buggsyMustPass.name: creation-usability
buggsyMustPass.description: Typing, drawing, choosing panels, or submitting work feels usable on the primary device.
buggsyMustPass.threshold: Text input is focusable and accepts typing on Surface Pro 5 keyboard. Drawing/panel tools are operable via touch or trackpad. Submit button is reachable without scrolling off-screen.
buggsyMustPass.measurement_method: At buggsy-workstation viewport (1368×912): interact with primary creation control (text input, canvas, or panel picker). Assert input is accepted without errors.
buggsyMustPass.source: Pixton Education usability; Book Creator Comics panel creation

buggsyMustPass.name: resume-integrity
buggsyMustPass.description: Drafts, submissions, or completion states resume correctly when the surface promises resume.
buggsyMustPass.threshold: For surfaces with persistence_contract = 'draft' or 'submitted' in surface-map.md: navigate away, return, assert the saved state is restored. No missing panels, blank editors, or lost question position.
buggsyMustPass.measurement_method: Create or submit content; navigate to another route; return; assert state matches pre-navigation state.

buggsyMustPass.name: challenge-fit
buggsyMustPass.description: Tasks feel age-appropriate — not babyish, not needlessly frustrating.
buggsyMustPass.threshold: Content difficulty is aligned with Buggsy's curriculum level. No kindergarten-level tasks on a 3rd-4th grade module. No tasks that require knowledge clearly beyond grade level.
buggsyMustPass.measurement_method: Review 3 questions or task prompts from the current content set. Assert difficulty is grade-appropriate per Curriculum tab TEKS alignment.
buggsyMustPass.source: Curriculum tab TEKS fields; Prodigy curriculum-aligned challenge standard

buggsyMustPass.name: artifact-or-accomplishment
buggsyMustPass.description: The child leaves with a saved artifact, submitted answer, completed mission, or explicit earned progress.
buggsyMustPass.threshold: Completing a session produces a durable record (submitted answer in KH_Education, saved comic in KH_StoryProgress, completed mission in KH_MissionState, or earned rings in KH_Rewards).
buggsyMustPass.measurement_method: Complete a session; verify backend record exists via Safe wrapper API call. Assert record is non-empty.
buggsyMustPass.source: MVSS v1 plan section 5; KH mutation paths

shouldPass.name: entry-transition
shouldPass.description: Entry animation or transition helps the child understand a mode change.
shouldPass.threshold: Route load includes a visible transition or loading animation (not a hard-cut blank-to-content). Duration ≥300ms and ≤2s.
shouldPass.measurement_method: Record route load; assert transition animation is present in first 2s of video.

shouldPass.name: success-rewarding
shouldPass.description: The success state feels rewarding enough to invite one more action.
shouldPass.threshold: Post-completion state shows a distinct reward/celebration element. Child can see a clear 'you did it' signal before being returned to the hub.
shouldPass.measurement_method: Complete final task in session; screenshot success state; assert reward element is present.

shouldPass.name: copy-concise
shouldPass.description: Copy remains concise and readable at the target age.
shouldPass.threshold: No instruction block exceeds 50 words. Error and success messages use tokens from ops/copy-patterns.md.
shouldPass.measurement_method: grep all text content strings in surface HTML; assert max length. Check error/success copy against ops/copy-patterns.md allowed token set.

shouldPass.name: progress-visible
shouldPass.description: There is a visible progress indicator during a multi-step activity.
shouldPass.threshold: For activities with ≥3 steps: a step counter, progress bar, or question number indicator is visible in the surface.
shouldPass.measurement_method: Count steps in core loop. If ≥3, assert progress indicator element exists in DOM.

shouldPass.name: performance-smooth
shouldPass.description: Performance feels smooth on target hardware during the core loop. No obvious jank.
shouldPass.threshold: Frame rate ≥30fps during core loop interaction on target device. No visual jank lasting >500ms.
shouldPass.measurement_method: Playwright trace: record frame timing during core loop interaction. Assert average frame time ≤33ms (30fps). Automated measurement requires instrumentation.
shouldPass.source: MVSS v1 plan section J perf criteria

crossSurface.name: nav-placement
crossSurface.description: Primary navigation is at an identical selector across the child's surface set.
crossSurface.threshold: DOM selector for the primary nav element matches across all surfaces in the same child's surface set.
crossSurface.measurement_method: For each surface in the child's family, assert the primary nav selector (e.g. '.kh-nav', '.sk-nav') is present and at the same DOM location.

crossSurface.name: back-behavior
crossSurface.description: Back destination is declared per-route in ops/surface-map.md back_destination column and verified.
crossSurface.threshold: Back action (back button or escape gesture) navigates to the route declared in ops/surface-map.md back_destination. If back_destination = 'none', no back button should be visible.
crossSurface.measurement_method: Read back_destination from ops/surface-map.md for the route. Click back button; assert URL matches declared destination.

crossSurface.name: save-indicator
crossSurface.description: Save status uses only allowed tokens: 'Saved', 'Saving...', 'Unsaved changes'.
crossSurface.threshold: All save-state text in the surface matches exactly one of the allowed tokens. No custom or variant copy.
crossSurface.measurement_method: grep -n 'Saved\|Saving\|Unsaved\|saved\|saving\|unsaved' <surface.html> | assert only allowed tokens present

crossSurface.name: success-copy
crossSurface.description: Success copy uses patterns from ops/copy-patterns.md success token set.
crossSurface.threshold: Success messages match approved patterns in ops/copy-patterns.md. No one-off copy that does not follow the pattern.
crossSurface.measurement_method: grep success-message elements in surface HTML; cross-reference against ops/copy-patterns.md approved success tokens.

crossSurface.name: error-copy
crossSurface.description: Error copy follows the pattern: [what failed] + [user-actionable next step].
crossSurface.threshold: Error messages contain both (a) a statement of what failed and (b) a specific next step the child can take. No generic 'Error occurred' without context.
crossSurface.measurement_method: Identify all error message strings in surface HTML. Assert each string matches pattern: '[failure description]. [action step].'

comicStudio.name: panel-layout-library
comicStudio.description: At least 6 panel layouts are available and usable without freeform drawing.
comicStudio.threshold: Count panel layout options in the comic creation UI. Assert ≥6 distinct layouts are selectable.
comicStudio.measurement_method: Open ComicStudio panel picker; count layout options; assert ≥6.
comicStudio.source: Book Creator Comics panel library; MVSS v1 plan section G

comicStudio.name: dialogue-affordance
comicStudio.description: Speech bubble placement and text entry works on Surface Pro 5. Dialogue is a first-class creation action.
comicStudio.threshold: Can add a speech bubble to a panel and type dialogue text. Speech bubble is moveable. Text is readable at buggsy-workstation viewport.
comicStudio.measurement_method: At buggsy-workstation (1368×912): add speech bubble, type text, move bubble, assert text is readable in screenshot.
comicStudio.source: Book Creator Comics dialogue affordance; MVSS v1 plan section G

comicStudio.name: character-placement
comicStudio.description: Drag-drop character or image onto a panel works. No character rigging is required.
comicStudio.threshold: Character or image asset can be placed onto a panel via drag-drop or tap-to-place. No rigging, skeleton, or animation setup is required to place a character.
comicStudio.measurement_method: Open character picker; place character onto panel; assert character is visible in panel screenshot.
comicStudio.source: Pixton character placement standard; MVSS v1 plan section G

comicStudio.name: canvas-freeform
comicStudio.description: Freeform drawing and image import work as panel layer actions.
comicStudio.threshold: User can draw freeform strokes on a panel canvas. User can import an image as a panel layer.
comicStudio.measurement_method: Draw a stroke on a panel; assert stroke is visible. Import an image; assert it appears as a layer.
comicStudio.source: Book Creator canvas; MVSS v1 plan section G

comicStudio.name: artifact-export
comicStudio.description: Saves and exports a single comic as PNG or PDF. The exported artifact is restorable.
comicStudio.threshold: Can save a comic (writes to KH_StoryProgress). Can export as PNG or PDF. Saved comic can be reopened and viewed.
comicStudio.measurement_method: Create a 1-panel comic; save; export; reopen from StoryLibrary; assert panels are intact.
comicStudio.source: Book Creator export standard; KH_StoryProgress write contract

comicStudio.name: multi-comic-library
comicStudio.description: Library of past comics persists and each comic is reopenable.
comicStudio.threshold: StoryLibrary shows ≥1 past comic (if any have been saved). Each listed comic opens correctly. Reopened comic matches the saved state.
comicStudio.measurement_method: Save ≥1 comic; navigate to StoryLibrary; assert comics are listed; open each; assert panels match saved state.
comicStudio.source: Book Creator multi-book library; KH_StoryProgress list contract

jj.name: ABCmouse
jj.reason: Guided early-learning path, safe navigation, and progress framing.

jj.name: Khan Academy Kids
jj.reason: Playful academic experience plus social-emotional and progress features.

jj.name: PBS KIDS
jj.reason: Age-appropriate delight and approachable kid-first interaction patterns.

buggsy.name: Prodigy Math
buggsy.reason: Quest clarity, reward momentum, and curriculum-aligned challenge.

buggsy.name: Pixton Education
buggsy.reason: Comic creation with literacy, engagement, and comprehension framing.

buggsy.name: Book Creator Comics
buggsy.reason: Student-friendly comic creation, multimodal output, and accessibility cues.

automationFlow.name: resolve-run-context
automationFlow.description: Resolve route into child, device profile, and core loop. Fail as config_drift if device profile is missing or ambiguous in ops/surface-map.md.

automationFlow.name: load-benchmark-set
automationFlow.description: Load the benchmark set assigned to the child.

automationFlow.name: fail-closed-on-config-drift
automationFlow.description: Fail as config_drift if the device profile is missing or disputed.

automationFlow.name: run-preflight-preconditions
automationFlow.description: Run PRE-1 through PRE-4. Fail as preconditions_not_met if any precondition fails. This does not count toward the competitive ship decision.

automationFlow.name: run-preflight-technical
automationFlow.description: Confirm route responds, sandbox or fixture mode is chosen, and evidence capture (screenshots, console log) is active.

automationFlow.name: run-universal-checks
automationFlow.description: Run universal must-pass criteria U1 through U16.

automationFlow.name: run-child-specific-checks
automationFlow.description: Run JJ must-pass (J1-J6) or Buggsy must-pass (B1-B6) criteria as appropriate.

automationFlow.name: run-comic-studio-checks
automationFlow.description: For /comic-studio route only: run C1-C6 criteria.

automationFlow.name: run-benchmark-comparison
automationFlow.description: Compare the surface against the child benchmark categories.

automationFlow.name: count-should-pass-weaknesses
automationFlow.description: Count should-pass misses (S1-S5) and note non-critical benchmark gaps.

automationFlow.name: emit-findings
automationFlow.description: Emit route, device_profile, criterion_id, severity, and evidence for each finding.

severityMapping.when: any universal or child-specific or cross-surface or comic-studio must-pass criterion fails
two or more should-pass criteria fail
one should-pass criterion fails or one non-critical benchmark category is behind
benchmark note exists without a direct product gap
